item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Here it is, folks! There are still a couple of [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The 2026-2027 Season of Events on May 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include season of events and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Ribbon Cutting | Grand Opening of Bettsville EMS Station #3 - 06/13/2026 10:00am EDT to 06/13/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 495 Emma St, Bettsville, OH 44815, USA oin the Seneca Regional Chamber & Development Ambassadors and Seneca County EMS for a ribbon cutting and open house celebrating the completion of Seneca County EMS Station #3 on Saturday, June 13, 2026, at 10 AM. The event will take place at 495 Emma Street, Bettsville, OH 44815. The opening of Station #3 represents the next chapter in a countywide effort to transform emergency medical services throughout Seneca County. In November 2022, voters approved a 2.5 mill levy to support the Seneca County Joint Ambulance District, bringing together five villages and 11 townships into a unified EMS system with a shared goal of providing above-average response times and high-quality emergency care. Since then, Seneca County EMS has steadily worked toward that vision. In September 2024, community members gathered to celebrate the opening of EMS Station #4 in Bloomville. Less than a year later, EMS Station #5 opened in New Riegel, further strengthening coverage across southern Seneca County. Now, with the completion of Station #3 in Bettsville, another major piece of the county’s long-term strategy is coming to life. Operating under the motto “Powerful Partnerships for Critical Care,” Seneca County EMS continues to demonstrate how collaboration, innovation, and strategic investment can improve services for residents throughout the county. These facilities are more than buildings. They represent a commitment to faster response times, modern equipment, enhanced emergency preparedness, and the ability to deliver critical care when and where it is needed most. The new station will provide EMS personnel with a modern base of operations designed to support both current and future emergency medical needs. It also reflects the continued partnership between local communities, county leaders, EMS personnel, and voters who recognized the importance of investing in public safety. Following the ribbon cutting, guests will have the opportunity to tour the facility, meet EMS personnel, and learn more about the equipment, technology, and services that help keep Seneca County residents safe every day. We invite the community to join us in celebrating this important milestone and the continued progress being made to strengthen emergency medical services across Seneca County.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Ribbon Cutting | Grand Opening of Bettsville EMS Station #3 on Jun 13, 2026 in Bettsville, OH. Featured themes include community members and emergency medical services.

item.title: Movie Night - 06/13/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/13/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 131 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Food, Family, & Film: Community Movie Night! Mark your calendars for a wonderful evening of fellowship, food, and fun! We are hosting a Community Family Movie Night at Trinity UCC, and we want you and your family to be a part of it. Even more special? This is one of our final chances to catch a movie night and share a meal with Pastor Karsten before he bids us farewell at the end of July. Let’s pack the room, share some great food, and send him off with fantastic memories! Event Schedule (Saturday, June 13): 6:00 pm – Community Potluck: Bring your favorite dish, side, or dessert to share! We’ll provide the drinks and a welcoming table. 6:30 pm – Family Movie Night: Popcorn is on us! Grab a seat, relax, and enjoy a fun, family-friendly film together. Where: Trinity United Church of Christ 131 E Perry St., Tiffin This event is completely free and open to everyone in the community—so bring the kids, invite the neighbors, and don't forget your favorite potluck dish. Let's make this a night to remember for our church family and for Pastor Karsten! https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/trinityucc?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZb2uXh6oYb1Xlu-8yf1unkJb5Yu_Nyqck8Posbn1CaolGlQRrSHujE86WOfpg18tSAvZR-D5o8NdtmIrZHbjh1w54h-SN2FOhmFT59X44z7d_EAs-T5XvmQSilbYrWdxSqUFLn4P-zWSTaEqe56rCW4&__tn__=q https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/tiffinohio?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZb2uXh6oYb1Xlu-8yf1unkJb5Yu_Nyqck8Posbn1CaolGlQRrSHujE86WOfpg18tSAvZR-D5o8NdtmIrZHbjh1w54h-SN2FOhmFT59X44z7d_EAs-T5XvmQSilbYrWdxSqUFLn4P-zWSTaEqe56rCW4&__tn__=q https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/familymovienight?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZb2uXh6oYb1Xlu-8yf1unkJb5Yu_Nyqck8Posbn1CaolGlQRrSHujE86WOfpg18tSAvZR-D5o8NdtmIrZHbjh1w54h-SN2FOhmFT59X44z7d_EAs-T5XvmQSilbYrWdxSqUFLn4P-zWSTaEqe56rCW4&__tn__=q https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/communitypotluck?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZb2uXh6oYb1Xlu-8yf1unkJb5Yu_Nyqck8Posbn1CaolGlQRrSHujE86WOfpg18tSAvZR-D5o8NdtmIrZHbjh1w54h-SN2FOhmFT59X44z7d_EAs-T5XvmQSilbYrWdxSqUFLn4P-zWSTaEqe56rCW4&__tn__=q https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/fellowship?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZb2uXh6oYb1Xlu-8yf1unkJb5Yu_Nyqck8Posbn1CaolGlQRrSHujE86WOfpg18tSAvZR-D5o8NdtmIrZHbjh1w54h-SN2FOhmFT59X44z7d_EAs-T5XvmQSilbYrWdxSqUFLn4P-zWSTaEqe56rCW4&__tn__=q https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/allarewelcome?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZb2uXh6oYb1Xlu-8yf1unkJb5Yu_Nyqck8Posbn1CaolGlQRrSHujE86WOfpg18tSAvZR-D5o8NdtmIrZHbjh1w54h-SN2FOhmFT59X44z7d_EAs-T5XvmQSilbYrWdxSqUFLn4P-zWSTaEqe56rCW4&__tn__=q
item.dc:creator: Trinity United Church of Christ Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Movie Night on Jun 13, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Kids & Family and children.

item.title: Sunday Brunch & Trivia - 06/14/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/14/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 138 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at Empire for Brunch & Trivia on Sunday, June 14. The restaurant will open at 11:00 AM with our full brunch menu available. Trivia will begin at 12:00 PM and run through approximately 2:00 PM, featuring a mix of general knowledge and music trivia throughout the afternoon. This event will take place in the main dining room. Reservations are encouraged. Call us today to get a table for your team: (419) 448-7733. Gather your group and enjoy a relaxed Sunday with great food, drinks, and a little friendly competition.
item.dc:creator: The Empire Bistro
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Sunday Brunch & Trivia on Jun 14, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and trivia.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/14/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/14/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer. Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? Message us or tag a business that should join the chase! https://forms.gle/w9RFF2Hy6xC51W657
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 14, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include family friends and interactive experience.

item.title: Strong is the New Pretty Tween Workshop - 06/15/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/18/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 113 Melmore St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Spend the week at the Rustic Flair & Brush studio as we help develop a strong foundation for the successful future of our students. Every day, each student will have a creative project that ties to the lesson of the day. Completing creative hands-on projects will help them engage, interact and help
item.dc:creator: Rustic Flair & Brush

item.title: Good Shepherd Home Car Show - 06/15/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/15/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 725 Columbus Ave, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Rev up for a fun-filled afternoon at the Good Shepherd Home Car Show! Join us on June 15 from 2–4 PM for music, food, fellowship, and plenty of amazing cars—from classics to crowd favorites. Interested in participating with your own vehicle? Contact Wahneta at 419-937-1801 or wmockensturm@goodshepherdhome.com for more information or to sign up!
item.dc:creator: Good Shepherd Home
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Good Shepherd Home Car Show on Jun 15, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fostoria, ohio and good shepherd home.

item.title: Fostoria Women Empowering Women - 06/15/2026 5:30pm EDT to 06/15/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 154 W Center St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA null
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Fostoria Women Empowering Women on Jun 15, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fostoria women empowering women and fostoria, ohio.

item.title: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study - 06/15/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/15/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us for Celebrate Recovery Bible Study Monday nights at 6pm. A group for everyone, as we deal with the hurts, hang ups, and habits in life. Bring your family, friends, and neighbors. A time of Bible Study, sharing life, and fellowship. No childcare is provided.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study on Jun 15, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fostoria, ohio and group for everyone.

item.title: Young Adventurers—Bats! - 06/15/2026 8:00pm EDT to 06/15/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Fruth Wetland Nature Preserve, 10130 OH-18, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA For ages 5 to 12 years.  Join Linda Rose as we explore and search the evening sky for bats.  Learn about their habitats, food requirements and much more. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Young Adventurers—Bats! on Jun 15, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include young adventurers and Kids & Family.

item.title: Laundry Day - 06/16/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/16/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Sign up for our free laundry days this month at FNC Hope Community Center. Laundry Days, Tuesday June 2nd & 16th 9am-3pm Each family can wash 1 load per month free, laundry detergent is also provided. You must sign up online for an appointment by clicking the link below, or contact Fostoria Church of the Nazarene or the United Way of Fostoria by phone to help you sign up. The location is 339 Sandusky Street in the FNC Community Center https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0548AEAB2FAAFBC25-60083268-laundry
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Laundry Day on Jun 16, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include laundry day and laundry detergent.

item.title: Archery 101 - 06/16/2026 10:00am EDT to 06/16/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 3362 Infirmary Rd, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Linda Rose to learn the basics of archery and then try to hit the target.  All supplies provided.  Ages 10 years and older.  Limited registration. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Archery 101 on Jun 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Classes/Workshops and ages 10 and older.

item.title: Family Storytime - 06/16/2026 10:30am EDT to 06/16/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will offer “Family Storytime” on Tuesdays, June 2, 9, 16, 23, and 30 at 10:30 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. “Family Storytime” features stories, songs, rhymes, games, and more for the entire family. All ages are welcome and registration is not required. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Family Storytime on Jun 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include all ages and family storytime.

item.title: Grab And Go Lunches For Kids - 06/16/2026 12:00pm EDT to 06/16/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Grab And Go Lunches For Kids are each Tuesday in June and July 12pm-1pm, or until they run out, at FNC Hope Community Center.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Grab And Go Lunches For Kids on Jun 16, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include Kids & Family and community center.

Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer. Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? Message us or tag a business that should join the chase! https://forms.gle/w9RFF2Hy6xC51W657
item.dc:creator: Steinmetz Signs & Graphic Ink (SSG Ink - Shortened)
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include interactive adventure and interactive experience.

item.title: Gardening and Grazing - Seneca Conservation District - 06/16/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/16/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Seneca Conservation District for a hands-on activity of gardening and grazing. Please call Allen Eiry Center to sign up (419) 448-9774.
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Gardening and Grazing - Seneca Conservation District on Jun 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Parks & Rec.

item.title: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! - 06/16/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/16/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will offer a special summer edition of “Teen Tuesday” on Tuesdays, June 2, 9, 16, 23, and 30 from 2:00 p.m. to 3:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Teens entering grades 6 through 12 are invited to a weekly hangout featuring games, snacks, crafts and more. Part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story.” For more information, log onto http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! on Jun 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Kids & Family.

item.title: Stunt Dog Show with Team Zoom - 06/16/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/16/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host Team Zoom Canine Entertainment for a stunt dog show on Tuesday, June 16 at 6:00 p.m. at the East Green Amphitheater. This high energy stunt dog show features rescue dog comedians who bring the laughs while performing amazing feats of agility. This program is fun for the whole family and is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, call 419-447-3751 or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Stunt Dog Show with Team Zoom on Jun 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include stunt dog show and team zoom.

item.title: "Colored Pencil Crushed Can" Tuesday, June 16, 2026 6pm-9pm #06162601 - 06/16/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/16/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA In this class you will use colored pencils to create a 5"x7" drawing of a crushed can, learning about strokes and blending techniques. All supplies are provided. Preregistration is required by Saturday June 13. Minimum class size is 3 people. The cost is $45 for TAG members & $55 for non-members. Contact Mike Fink (813-695-0506), or TAG (419-443-0478), or tiffinartguild@att.net with questions. You can also stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Colored Pencil Crushed Can" Tuesday, June 16, 2026 6pm-9pm #06162601 on Jun 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include drawing techniques and minimum class size.

item.title: Rubber Ducky Wednesday - 06/17/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/17/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Rubber Ducky Wednesday” on Wednesdays, June 3, 10, 17, and 24 at 11:00 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Babies age birth to 35 months and their caregivers are invited to a story time on June 3, June 10, and June 17 with books, songs and lap bounces. On June 24, join the Library for a play date with toys and books for the babies to enjoy together. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Rubber Ducky Wednesday on Jun 17, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include youth services and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Attica community blood drive - 06/17/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/17/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 15127 E Township Rd 12, Attica, OH 44807, USA The next Attica community blood drive will be held on Wednesday, June 17, 2026 from 1 PM until 6 PM. This will be located at the Attica fairgrounds and is sponsored by the Attica Lions club and the Attica independent fair board.
item.dc:creator: Attica Lions Club
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Attica community blood drive on Jun 17, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include blood donation and community blood drive.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/17/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/17/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer. Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? Message us or tag a business that should join the chase! https://forms.gle/w9RFF2Hy6xC51W657

item.title: Craft Creation—Red, White and Brew - 06/17/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/17/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Bring your creativity with you as we paint a bottle in patriotic colors while sipping some sun-brewed tea. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Craft Creation—Red, White and Brew on Jun 17, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include sipping tea and Arts.

item.title: Paintings Gone Prehistoric - 06/17/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/17/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Tiffin-Seneca Public Library for “Paintings Gone Prehistoric,” a creative event for teens entering grades six through twelve on Wednesday, June 17, from 2:00 to 3:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Participants will have the opportunity to give classic paintings a prehistoric twist by incorporating dinosaurs, volcanoes, meteors, and other imaginative elements. All craft supplies will be provided. This event is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program theme, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, call 419-447-3751 or visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Paintings Gone Prehistoric on Jun 17, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Seasonal & Holiday and craft supplies.

item.title: Ribbon Cutting | Pets in Balance - 06/17/2026 4:00pm EDT to 06/17/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 560 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Seneca Regional Chamber & Development Ambassadors as they celebrate the grand opening of Pets in Balance with a ribbon cutting ceremony on Wednesday, June 17 at 4PM. The clinic is located at 560 Miami Street in Tiffin. Pets in Balance is a specialized veterinary clinic dedicated to helping pets achieve greater comfort, mobility, and overall wellness through acupuncture and spinal care. Led by Dr. Amber Stover, a licensed veterinarian with more than 30 years of experience, the practice focuses on holistic therapies designed to address the root causes of pain and imbalance in pets. Dr. Stover is one of only a few veterinarians in Ohio licensed to provide veterinary acupuncture. After decades of practicing traditional veterinary medicine, including more than 18 years serving local pets through a respected house-call practice, Dr. Stover opened Pets in Balance to offer personalized, natural treatment options for cats and dogs experiencing mobility challenges, discomfort, anxiety, or age-related changes. By combining veterinary acupuncture and spinal care, Pets in Balance helps support the body's natural healing processes while improving comfort, alignment, and quality of life. These gentle therapies have been shown to help reduce pain, improve mobility, and promote overall well-being for pets of all ages. Community members, pet owners, and supporters are invited to attend the ribbon cutting ceremony, tour the clinic, meet Dr. Stover, and learn more about the innovative services available at Pets in Balance. Join us in welcoming this unique addition to Tiffin's business community and celebrating a new resource for pet health and wellness in Northwest Ohio.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Ribbon Cutting | Pets in Balance on Jun 17, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include acupuncture and age-related changes.

item.title: Film Fusion: Adult Interactive Movie Night - 06/17/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/17/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will a host “Film Fusion,” an adult interactive movie night, on Wednesday, June 17 from 6:00 to 8:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Join the Library for an unforgettable evening of cinematic immersion. Step into the screen and become part of the action as we watch the 1993 movie that follows a group of visitors trapped in a park where cloned prehistoric creatures break loose, turning a showcase of science into a fight for survival. Everything will be provided, including refreshments. No registration required. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story.” For more information or for a complete list of summer reading events, please call (419) 447-3751 or log onto http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Film Fusion: Adult Interactive Movie Night on Jun 17, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Film and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Bible Study in Acts - 06/17/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/17/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us at 6pm Wednesday Nights for Bible Study through the book of Acts. Everyone is welcome. Childcare is not provided. Contact us with any questions.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Bible Study in Acts on Jun 17, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include Religious and Kids & Family.

item.title: Foot Long Fundraiser - 06/18/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/18/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 182 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Foot long hot dog, chips, cookie and bottle of water for $7.00. Place orders by June 11th at 419-447-3141 or Kellie.Hartsel@stfrancishome.org. Pick up on June 18th from 11am - 1pm.
item.dc:creator: St. Francis Senior Ministries
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Foot Long Fundraiser on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include foot long hot dog and fundraiser.

item.title: Discovery Series—Paint a Walking Stick - 06/18/2026 2:00pm EDT to 06/18/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Fort Seneca, OH 44883, USA For youth ages 12 to 17 years and older.  Join Linda Rose as we design and paint our own walking stick.  Go to the woods and find a special “walking stick” or use one that the park district has found.  All paint supplies will be provided, just bring your creativity. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Discovery Series—Paint a Walking Stick on Jun 18, 2026 in Fort Seneca, OH. Featured themes include registration and walking stick.

item.title: Escape Dino Park - 06/18/2026 3:00pm EDT to 06/18/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library's Youth Services Department for "Escape Dino Park" on Thursday, June 18, from 3:00 to 6:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Something has gone awry at the dinosaur park—power is down, gates are locked, and dinosaurs are on the move! Kids in first through fifth grade are invited to drop in anytime to collaborate on solving puzzles, following dinosaur tracks, cracking secret codes, and navigating the park map to escape before time runs out. This exciting event is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more details, visit the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or go to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Escape Dino Park on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include summer reading program and tiffin seneca public library.

item.title: Ribbon Cutting | The Love Lock Structure in Downtown Tiffin - 06/18/2026 4:00pm EDT to 06/18/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 133 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Seneca Regional Chamber & Development Ambassadors and Downtown Tiffin are excited to invite the community to a special ribbon cutting ceremony celebrating the installation of the new Love Lock structure located at the East Green at National Corner adjacent to the Splash Pad. The event will take place on Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 4 PM and is open to the public. The Love Lock structure was created through the efforts of the Downtown Tiffin Design Committee as part of Downtown Tiffin’s ongoing beautification initiatives, including the Best Foot Forward Program and the Golden Broom Award. These programs encourage businesses and property owners to maintain attractive storefronts and contribute to the overall appearance and vibrancy of the downtown district. The Design Committee also helps organize Downtown Clean Ups and other aesthetic improvement efforts throughout the community. Inspired by the Pont des Arts Love Lock Bridge in Paris, France, as well as similar installations found in Main Street communities across the country, the Downtown Tiffin Love Lock structure gives couples an opportunity to symbolize their love by attaching a lock to the structure and tossing the key into a designated key box attached nearby. The structure was generously donated by Price Manufacturing and will serve as a unique new attraction and photo opportunity in Downtown Tiffin, featuring the East Tower as a scenic backdrop. Located near the amphitheater, the East Green has become a gathering place for couples and families attending concerts and community events. It also holds special meaning as the location where couples were married during the memorable 2024 Total Eclipse celebration. Community members are encouraged to attend the ribbon cutting, celebrate this new addition to Downtown Tiffin, and learn more about how Downtown Tiffin continues to create welcoming and memorable public spaces for residents and visitors alike.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Ribbon Cutting | The Love Lock Structure in Downtown Tiffin on Jun 18, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include love lock structure and History & Museums.

item.title: Brick Builders Club - 06/18/2026 4:30pm EDT to 06/18/2026 5:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA null
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Brick Builders Club on Jun 18, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include brick builders club and seneca east public library.
